{{Quote|A man in my position has enemies everywhere.|Lorn Kabul|<ref name="Three Against the Galaxy">{{Tales|3|Three Against the Galaxy}}</ref>}}
'''Lorn Kabul''', addressed as "Lord Kabul" and "Master Kabul", was the owner of a [[Kabul Industries|mining operation]] on [[Otunia]] and the father of [[Arista Kabul]].

==Biography==
A loving father, Lorn nevertheless thought Arista was too irresponsible and made her wear a [[Homing beacon/Legends|tracking device]] on her ankle at all times.

He was killed by his brother [[Seth Kabul]] who, scheming with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Harsh]] wanted to take over the mining operation. As Lorn lay dying, he asked the unusually noble [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]], [[Grissom (Gamorrean)|Grissom]], to protect Arista and help her make it off-planet.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|3|Three Against the Galaxy}} {{1st}}
